name: Chicken Salad with Dried Cherrries
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup red or green seedless grapes, halved
1/4 cup walnut or macadamia nuts, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the mayonnaise and yogurt until well combined.
2. Add the diced chicken to the mixture and stir gently.
3. Fold in the halved grapes, chopped nuts, and dried cherries.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Serve over a bed of lettuce leaves.
